cli.wizard.error.interactive_required: lansè wizard la mande antre entèaktif. Itilize `wizard --answers <FILE>`, `wizard apply --answers <FILE>`, oswa `wizard validate --answers <FILE>`.
cli.wizard.error.invalid_selection: seleksyon pa valab; te espere 1 oswa 2

runtime.passthrough.error.binary_not_fou: pa t kapab jwenn `{name}` nan PATH; defini {env_key}, enstale `{name}` ak cargo binstall, oswa kouri `greentic-dev install tools` (`--latest` pou fòse rafrechisman)
runtime.passthrough.error.env_binary_mis: {env_key} montre sou yon binè ki pa egziste: {path}
runtime.tools.install.error.binstall_fai: `cargo binstall` echwe pandan enstalasyon {bin_name} (crate {crate_name}), kòd sòti {exit_code}
runtime.tools.install.error.install_bins: echèk pou enstale cargo-binstall; `cargo install cargo-binstall --locked` kòd sòti {exit_code}
runtime.tools.install.installing: greentic-dev: ap enstale {bin_name} soti nan crate {crate_name} atravè cargo binstall...
runtime.tools.install.updating_binstall: greentic-dev: ap mete `cargo-binstall` ajou soti nan {installed_version} pou rive {latest_version} atravè cargo...
runtime.tools.install.warn.latest_check_: greentic-dev: pa t kapab verifye dènye vèsyon `cargo-binstall` la ({error}); ap kontinye ak vèsyon enstale a {installed_version}.
runtime.wizard.confirm.error.non_interac: refize egzekite nan mòd ki pa entèaktif san konfimasyon. Relanse ak `--execute --yes` oswa `--execute --non-interactive`.
runtime.wizard.executor.error.command_no: kòmand `{program}` pa otorize pa default; sèvi ak --unsafe-commands pou pèmèt li
runtime.wizard.executor.error.destructiv: plan an mande operasyon destriktif; relanse ak --allow-destructive
runtime.wizard.executor.error.replay_pin: pin replay la pa koresponn pou {program}: te espere {expected}, te resevwa {actual}
runtime.wizard.executor.error.step_faile: kòmand etap wizard la echwe: {program} {args} (kòd sòti {exit_code})
runtime.wizard.executor.error.unsafe_arg: kòmand `{program}` gen agiman bloke ki sanble ak shell; refize egzekite
